etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.general_idea: Add SuppressWarningsHolder to enable suppression of checkstyle violations via annotations.
Add modern checkstyle modules for Java 8+ syntax features like lambdas and try-with-resources.
Add Indentation check with specific configuration for array initialization and line wrapping.
Add comprehensive Javadoc checks including paragraph, missing javadoc, and formatting rules.
etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.before:
<module name="JavadocStyle">
    <property name="severity" value="warning"/>
</module>
<module name="JavadocStyle">
    <property name="checkEmptyJavadoc" value="true"/>
</module>
<module name="JavadocMethod">
    <property name="scope" value="protected"/>
    <property name="allowUndeclaredRTE" value="true"/>
</module>
<module name="JavadocVariable">
    <property name="scope" value="protected"/>
</module>
etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.after:
<module name="JavadocStyle">
  <property name="severity" value="warning"/>
  <property name="checkEmptyJavadoc" value="true"/>
</module>
<module name="JavadocType"/>
<module name="JavadocMethod"/>
<module name="JavadocParagraph"/>
<module name="JavadocVariable">
  <property name="scope" value="protected"/>
  <property name="tokens" value="VARIABLE_DEF"/>
</module>
<module name="MissingJavadocMethodCheck">
  <property name="allowMissingPropertyJavadoc" value="true"/>
</module>
<module name="MissingJavadocTypeCheck"/>
<module name="MissingJavadocPackageCheck"/>
<module name="JavadocMissingLeadingAsteriskCheck"/>
<module name="JavadocMissingWhitespaceAfterAsteriskCheck"/>
<module name="JavadocContentLocationCheck"/>
<module name="JavadocBlockTagLocation"/>
<module name="InvalidJavadocPosition"/>

etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.general_idea: Remove deprecated or redundant checkstyle modules like JUnitTestCase and MultipleStringLiterals.
Update HiddenField check to allow setters to return their class type.
etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.before:
<module name="HiddenField">
    <property name="ignoreConstructorParameter" value="true"/>
    <property name="ignoreSetter" value="true"/>
    <property name="ignoreAbstractMethods" value="true"/>
</module>
etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.after:
<module name="HiddenField">
  <property name="ignoreConstructorParameter" value="true"/>
  <property name="ignoreSetter" value="true"/>
  <property name="ignoreAbstractMethods" value="true"/>
  <property name="setterCanReturnItsClass" value="true"/>
</module>

etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.general_idea: Consolidate and update IllegalImport checks to ban specific nullable annotations and set severity to error.
etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.before:
<module name="IllegalImport">
    <property name="illegalPkgs" value="junit"/>
</module>
<module name="IllegalImport">
    <property name="illegalPkgs" value="net.jcip.annotations"/>
</module>
etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.after:
<module name="IllegalImport">
  <property name="illegalPkgs" value="net.jcip.annotations"/>
  <property name="illegalClasses" value="edu.umd.cs.findbugs.annotations.Nullable, javax.annotation.Nullable, javax.annotation.CheckForNull, javax.annotation.Nonnull"/>
  <property name="severity" value="error"/>
</module>

etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.general_idea: Replace legacy suppression filters with the modern SuppressWarningsFilter.
etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.before:
<module name="SuppressionCommentFilter">
    <metadata name="com.atlassw.tools.eclipse.checkstyle.comment" value="Coupling Checks"/>
    <property name="offCommentFormat" value="CHECKSTYLE\:COUPLING-OFF"/>
    <property name="onCommentFormat" value="CHECKSTYLE\:COUPLING-ON"/>
    <property name="checkFormat" value=".*(Coupling|Complexity)"/>
</module>
<module name="SuppressionCommentFilter">
    <metadata name="com.atlassw.tools.eclipse.checkstyle.comment" value="Constants Checks"/>
    <property name="offCommentFormat" value="CHECKSTYLE\:CONSTANTS-OFF"/>
    <property name="onCommentFormat" value="CHECKSTYLE\:CONSTANTS-ON"/>
    <property name="checkFormat" value="(MagicNumber|MultipleStringLiterals)"/>
</module>
<module name="SuppressionCommentFilter">
    <metadata name="com.atlassw.tools.eclipse.checkstyle.comment" value="All Checks"/>
</module>
<module name="SuppressionFilter">
  <property name="file" value="${config_loc}/checkstyle-suppressions.xml"/>
</module>
  <module name="SuppressWithNearbyCommentFilter">
  <property name="commentFormat" value="NOCHECKSTYLE"/>
  <property name="checkFormat" value=".*"/>
</module>

etc/pmd-configuration.xml.general_idea: Refactor PMD configuration to use category-level rule references with explicit exclusions instead of listing every individual rule.
Remove PMD rules for technologies not used in the project (JSP, ECMAScript, Android, J2EE) to reduce noise and configuration size.
Add Maven project metadata comment to the PMD configuration file for better traceability.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add `maven-enforcer-plugin` to enforce the minimum Java version of 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Prevents accidental builds on older JDKs that would fail due to missing APIs or bytecode incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add `Automatic-Module-Name` to the JAR manifest to define a strong module name for the Java Platform Module System (JPMS).
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, the JAR is treated as an automatic module with a derived name, which can cause conflicts or warnings in modular applications.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the `maven-compiler-plugin` to a version that supports the `release` flag and JDK 11+ features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not correctly handle the `release` flag or JDK 11+ compilation options.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the `maven-javadoc-plugin` to a version compatible with JDK 11+ doclint and module structure.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Javadoc plugins may fail with JDK 11+ due to stricter doclint defaults or internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Error Prone and NullAway as annotation processors for static analysis during compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: These tools require specific JVM arguments and processor paths to function; adding them enables advanced static checks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add ArchUnit dependency to Surefire plugin for architecture testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: ArchUnit tests require the engine to be on the Surefire classpath to be discovered and executed.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JaCoCo plugin for code coverage reporting.
pom.xml.why_exists: Enables code coverage metrics which were previously handled by the deprecated Cobertura plugin.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add RevAPI plugin for API compatibility checking.
pom.xml.why_exists: Enforces semantic versioning and API stability checks during the build process.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Checkstyle plugin and configuration to a modern version compatible with JDK 11+.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Checkstyle versions may not support newer Java syntax or may have bugs with JDK 11+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update PMD plugin and configuration to a modern version compatible with JDK 11+.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older PMD versions may not support newer Java syntax or may have bugs with JDK 11+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add AssertJ dependency for fluent assertions in tests.
pom.xml.why_exists: Provides a more readable and powerful assertion library for JUnit 5 tests.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add EqualsVerifier dependency for testing `equals` and `hashCode` contracts.
pom.xml.why_exists: Automates verification of equality contracts, reducing boilerplate in tests.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Commons Lang and IO dependencies to modern versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions may have security vulnerabilities or lack features available in newer versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Nexus Staging and GPG plugins for releasing artifacts to Maven Central.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for publishing signed artifacts to the Sonatype OSSRH repository.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update project metadata including version, name, description, and developer information.
pom.xml.why_exists: Reflects the current state of the project and its maintainer.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add distribution management configuration for snapshot and release repositories.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for deploying artifacts to Maven Central.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add profiles for skipping tests and checks, and for release signing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Provides convenient ways to skip heavy checks during development or sign artifacts for release.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add dependency management for NullAway to centralize version control.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures consistent version usage across the project.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add resource configuration for `src/main/resources`.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures resources are included in the build output.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add SCM tag configuration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Helps Maven identify the current version's tag in the repository.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add license for Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License.
pom.xml.why_exists: Clarifies licensing for documentation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update developer email and organization information.
pom.xml.why_exists: Reflects current contact details.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update project URL to use HTTPS.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures secure access to the project website.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add ArgLine configuration for logging properties.
pom.xml.why_exists: Configures logging for tests.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Pitest plugin for mutation testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Enables mutation testing to assess test quality.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Depgraph plugin for dependency visualization.
pom.xml.why_exists: Helps visualize and analyze project dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add AssertJ Assertions Generator plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Automates generation of AssertJ assertion classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Source and Javadoc plugins to attach sources and javadocs to the build.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for publishing complete artifacts to Maven Central.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Release plugin configuration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Standardizes the release process.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Deploy, Install, and Clean plugins with explicit versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures consistent behavior across different Maven versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Dependency plugin with explicit version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures consistent behavior for dependency analysis.
